Article Title: IPL 2026: No-look six off Bumrah, 300 strike-rate - Salil Arora steals the spotlight in 502-run Wankhede run-fest
Article Text:
Salil Arora hit a 10-ball 30* to help SRH overhaul MI's record total (Screengrab/IPL)

Watch James Franklin post-match PC: SRH surprised by pitch, hails Nitish-Klaasen rescue act James Franklin post-match PC: SRH surprised by pitch, hails Nitish-Klaasen rescue act

Who is Salil Arora?

Salil Arora career snapshot and IPL journey

IPL 2026 auction price: ₹1.5 crore (base price ₹30 lakh)

Role: Wicketkeeper-batter, finisher

IPL 2026 so far: 93 runs in 8 innings, strike rate 175.47

First-class: 458 runs in 9 matches (avg 41.64), including a century on debut

T20 highlight: 39-ball century in the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy

When over 500 runs are scored in a game with one century, three fifties and as many as 32 sixes, it is difficult for a 10-ball 30 to stand out. But that is exactly what the young Salil Arora managed to do.Striking at 300, the Sunrisers Hyderabad finisher somewhat stole the limelight amid a plethora of highlight reels provided by Ryan Rickelton, Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head and Heinrich Klaasen. And the reason for that was one moment: a brute of a shot.A no-look six, straight down the ground, off arguably the best in the business - Jasprit Bumrah.Forget the fact that Bumrah has endured a torrid IPL 2026 season so far and that this was another tough outing last night at the Wankhede in the IPL 2026 fixture between MI and SRH, where he returned one of his most expensive spells. It was the audacity of a young batter to attempt and execute that shot with such swagger that truly stood out. It was the kind of confidence you associate with a Hardik Pandya in full flow or a Chris Gayle at his destructive best.He had started well with a perfect execution - a well-timed dab off Trent Boult’s wide yorker for a four. With 24 needed off 18 and Bumrah steaming in, it was going to be a decisive over. Bumrah has won his team many a game from such situations, but, when off the fifth ball, Arora kept his head down and clobbered the slower one in the slot straight over long-on - the game was sealed.By the time Arora clobbered Hardik Pandya for two sixes and a four, the contest was effectively done. But his unbeaten 30 off 10 balls was not just a finishing act - it was an impact innings, one that will not be forgotten in a hurry.Chasing 244, SRH had already been powered by their top order; add to that the calm authority of Klassen, but it was Arora’s finishing flourish that underlined SRH’s dominance. His cameo ensured there were no late stutters as the chase was completed with ease.For the Mumbai Indians , it was another difficult night with the ball. Bumrah finished with figures of 4-0-54-0, as the entire bowling unit was taken apart on a batting-friendly Wankhede surface.The 23-year-old wicketkeeper-batter from Amritsar has quietly been building his reputation as a fearless finisher. He represents Punjab in domestic cricket and is known for his aggressive, power-hitting approach.Sunrisers Hyderabad identified that potential early. In fact, in the very first game of the season, Arora was sent in ahead of Aniket Verma - a more established name in the SRH setup and someone who had delivered match-winning performances in the previous season. Despite modest returns initially, SRH continued to back Arora in the lower order.That faith has now been repaid.When the opportunity finally came on the big stage, Arora grabbed it with both hands. In a game filled with big scores and bigger names, it was a 10-ball 30 - and one audacious no-look six - that made the loudest statement.
Article Summary: Salil arora hit a 10-ball 30* to help srh overhaul mi's record total. The 23-year-old wicketkeeper-batter from amritsar has quietly been building his reputation as a fearless finisher. Arora was sent in ahead of aniket verma in the very first game of the season.

Komal Arora

Shamma Barkodia

Purnima Midha

Running for the past three years, she began with a single marathon out of curiosity, which soon aligned with her personality and interest in fitness. Article Title: Experience meets performance in 30–39 age group 10k men’s category
Article Text:
(Left to right): Shivpratap Prajapati, Shubham Kumar and Anil Jindal

NEW DELHI: The Times Internet Half Marathon turned the streets of the capital into a vibrant display of energy and determination as runners of all ages came together with a shared purpose to push limits and embrace fitness.The winner, Shivpratap Prajapati, 34 years old, clocked an impressive chip time of 32:01. Running for the past 10 years, he began with fitness as his primary motivation, later developing a deeper interest after participating in a school competition. While he was initially preparing for the Army, the lockdown shifted his path, leading him to pursue running more seriously. He now trains with the goal of representing India at the Commonwealth Games in 2028.The first runner-up position was secured by Shubham Kumar, who finished with a chip time of 32:34. Kumar maintained a steady pace throughout, staying close to the leader and delivering a strong, competitive performance.The second runner-up was Anil Jindal, 31 years old, who clocked a chip time of 34:50. Running for eight years, Jindal, an Army professional, focuses on long-distance races and has been actively participating in marathons. He recently competed in the Boston Marathon and aims to complete marathons across the world.At the Times Internet Half Marathon, performances like these reflected both ambition and discipline. Beyond timings, it was the dedication behind each run that truly stood out.
Article Summary: The times internet half marathon turned the streets of the capital into a vibrant display of energy and determination. The winner, shivpratap prajapati, 34 years old, clocked an impressive chip time of 32:01. The first runner-up position was secured by shubham kumar, who finished with a chip timeof 32:34.

Article Title: Emerging Women Athletes Shine in Under-29 10K Category at Times Internet Half Marathon
Article Text:
Photographed (L-R): Shakuntala Devi, Neha

NEW DELHI: The Times Internet Half Marathon saw strong participation from women athletes, with the under-29 10-kilometer category highlighting speed, determination, and emerging talent.Leading the category was 22-year-old Shakuntala Devi, who secured first place with a chip time of 42:31. Having been associated with running for the past five years, she credits her brother for introducing her to the sport and shaping her early journey. Shakuntla has represented at the national level, and after securing a position in her first marathon, she was encouraged to continue pursuing long-distance running. Since then, she has shown consistent progress, steadily building her performance.The second position was bagged by 18-year-old Neha, who clocked a chip time of 44:22. Having started running two years ago, Neha has been involved in sports from an early age, initially playing cricket and handball before transitioning into marathons. Speaking about her approach, she shared a dynamic perspective, saying she does not set fixed goals and prefers to focus on the present, adapting to opportunities as they come.She also described the Times Internet Half Marathon memorable experience.The third position was secured by Sweta Sah, 26 years old who clocked a chip time of 44:22, adding to the competitive edge of the category. Running for the past three years, she balances her profession as a physiotherapist with consistent training. For Sah, running is a practice of discipline and progress, and she is now preparing to take on longer distances with a focus on marathon running.The under-29 women’s category reflected a blend of emerging talent and evolving ambition, with runners at different stages of their journeys coming together on a common platform.As the race unfolded, it became evident that beyond timings and positions, the event celebrated intent and growth where each runner carried a story,and every finish line marked the beginning of something more.
Article Summary: The times internet half marathon saw strong participation from women athletes. The under-29 10-kilometer category highlighted speed, determination, and emerging talent. Shakuntala devi, 22, secured first place with a chip time of 42:31. The second position was bagged by 18-year-old neha, who clocked 44:22.

Article Title: NHL trade rumors grow as New Jersey Devils monitor Filip Gustavsson after he signs $34 million Minnesota Wild extension contract
Article Text:
Minnesota Wild goaltender Filip Gustavsson (32) tends net during the game between the Dallas Stars and the Minnesota Wild on April 9, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas. (Photo by Matthew Pearce/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images)

New Jersey Devils monitor Filip Gustavsson after Minnesota Wild NHL playoff goalie decision changes



Minnesota Wild goaltender Filip Gustavsson may be a possibility available to the New Jersey Devils in the NHL trade market since his future was brought into question following significant decisions with the playoff lineups. Gustavsson recently entered into a five-year deal with the Minnesota Wild, a contract extension worth $34 million, but after losing his starts at the Stanley Cup Playoffs, his nature was under question.The scenario has rapidly entered the newest NHL rumor trade since the New Jersey Devils remain on the hunt to establish goal stability over a long period of time. Jacob Markstrom and Jake Allen are viable solutions, but the franchise can still consider getting a young starting-level goalie prior to the upcoming NHL season.Filip Gustavsson was an unknown target of the New Jersey Devils as Minnesota Wild changed playoff duties to Jesper Wallstedt in the postseason games against the Dallas Stars.The 27-year-old goalie has exhibited some of the best NHL form in the last few seasons. He registered a .931 save percentage in the 2022-23 season of the NHL and succeeded it with an equally good season, which included five shutouts. Nevertheless, there has been a lack of consistency in the recent seasons, which has raised concerns within the organization.Filip Gustavsson might be an option that the New Jersey Devils can consider due to the fact that the team is yet to get a reliable long-term starter as it embarks on another significant season in the NHL. Jacob Markstrom has not been renewed yet, but his age and more recent form are causing a lot of questions as to what the future of the team will look like at the goalie position.Another goalie, should the Devils aggressively pursue it, may force the Devils to create cap space by considering players such as Dawson Mercer, Dougie Hamilton, or Stefan Noesen.Filip Gustavsson has a chance to become an instant boost to the playoffs of the New Jersey Devils in case he gets the regular starting shape back.With NHL trade rumor intensifying about decisions concerning the Minnesota Wild roster, the case of Gustavsson could keep being one of the most scrutinized goalies into the offseason.
Article Summary: Minnesota wild goaltender filip gustavsson may be a possibility available to the new jersey devils in the nhl trade market. Gustavsson recently entered into a five-year deal with the minnesota wild, a contract extension worth $34 million. The 27-year-old goalie has exhibited some of the best nhl form in the last few seasons.

Article Title: Venus Williams husband Andrea Preti can't stop gushing over his hot wife as Tennis legend shines in glamorous Vogue photoshoot
Article Text:
Andrea Preti and Venus Williams. Image via: Daniele Venturelli/ Getty Images

Venus Williams dazzles in Vogue shoot as Andrea Preti shows support

Tennis legend Venus Williams has once again grabbed attention but this time off the court with her latest glamorous look. The seven-time Grand Slam champion featured in a stunning photoshoot for Vogue. She flaunted her bold and stylish side. At 45, Williams proved that age is just a number. She confidently posed in high-fashion outfits. The photos quickly went viral on social media as fans praising her elegance.Her husband, Italian actor Andrea Preti , also joined the netizens praising her online. He shared the photos on his Instagram story with a heartfelt reaction, calling her his “Queen.” The couple, who got married in 2025, have often shown strong support for each other. Williams has also credited Preti for motivating her to continue playing tennis. Their relationship has become a talking point among fans, especially after this latest public display of admiration and love.Venus Williams impressed fans with two different looks in her Vogue feature. In the first photoshoot, she wore a stylish black Gucci one-shoulder dress. She kept her accessories simple. She tied her hair in a sleek ponytail.This gave a classy and modern look. In the second shoot she chose a more playful style. She wore a white crop top with a long green balloon skirt and paired it with bright pink footwear.During her interview, Williams shared that she enjoys standing out and doing things differently. She said she finds happiness in breaking expectations. She does not always following the usual path.Andrea Preti reposted his wife's pictures and showed his admiration in a short but loving message, calling her his queen with a blue heart.The couple first went public with their relationship in July 2025. They later married in Italy in September and held another ceremony in Florida in December. Williams had earlier shared that marriage was not part of her original plan. However, things changed as their relationship grew stronger. She revealed that Preti encouraged her to keep playing tennis and stay focused on her career.On the court, Williams recently competed in doubles at the Madrid Open. She partnered with Katie Boulter and secured her first win of the year against Jiang Xinyu and Xu Yifan. However, they lost in the next round to Hsieh Su-Wei and Sofia Kenin.
Article Summary: Venus williams dazzles in vogue shoot as andrea preti shows support for her. The photos quickly went viral on social media as fans praising her elegance. The couple, who got married in 2025, have often shown strong support for each other. Williams has also credited preti for motivating her to continue playing tennis.

Article Title: Dianna Russini Rumors: Dianna Russini to appear on Alex Cooper’s Call Her Daddy podcast
Article Text:
(Image via Getty: Dianna Russini and Alex Cooper) Dianna Russini Rumors: Dianna Russini to appear on Alex Cooper’s Call Her Daddy podcast

Dianna Russini could feature on Call Her Daddy podcast run by Alex Cooper

Dianna Russini had horrific, life altering in a negative way experience

103.5 The Fan host RJ Choppy reacted to Dianna Russini’s rumor on X.Football Crave shared an X post featuring Dianna Russini and Alex Cooper with the caption: “Rumors are swirling that Dianna Russini will appear on the Call Her Daddy Podcast. Female empowerment.”RJ Choppy captioned the Football Crave repost on his X as “But of course she will.”Alex Cooper’s Call Her Daddy podcast focuses on four topics: female empowerment, mental health, personal growth, and personal relationships. The show features heart-to-heart conversations with celebrities and experts who want to “reclaim power” and debunk mental health stigmas.Alex Cooper has interviewed Miley Cyrus , John Mayer, Chelsea Handler, Kelsea Ballerini, Britney Spears’ sister Jamie Lynn Spears, Justin Bieber ’s wife Hailey Rhode Bieber, and Academy Award-winning actress Jane Fonda.At the moment, Alex Cooper is doing internet rounds for her feud with Houston Texans WR Braxton Berrios’ ex-girlfriend Alix Earle. Alex Cooper released a TikTok video calling out Alix Earle’s passive-aggressive behavior, stating she was tired of “fake drama.”Alix Earle responded to it with a cryptic comment, “Okay on it!!” Anyhow, this was Alex Cooper’s mid-April 2026. At the same time, Dianna Russini resigned from The Athletic following the publication of her alleged Sedona luxury hotel pictures with New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel.The two probably have a lot to talk about.Everybody wants to know what Dianna Russini has to say. Since the news broke, conversations have been mostly about Dianna Russini, with very little about Mike Vrabel.Even NFL Hall of Famer Cris Carter probably noticed it. Cris Carter discussed the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel scandal on his Fully Loaded Podcast, co-hosted by Family First Life founder and president, Shawn Meaike.“My wife has been in the industry for a long, long time and has a lot of colleagues, a lot of friends, and her friends have done makeup, wardrobe, over the last 20 years, through all networks, all sports,” Cris Carter said on the Fully Loaded Podcast. “So, I wanna tell you that first and foremost. So, I do know some people that have talked to Dianna [Russini], and this has been a horrific experience for her. Like, life-altering in a negative way. And it shouldn’t be that way.And the only reason it is because she’s a female. This is a male-dominated world and anyone in this position, no one was surprised by the information, but to have her life altered and destroyed over having an affair with an NFL coach, I don’t care if he was a schoolteacher.Like, that shouldn’t ruin or alter her career, and it has. So, that’s why I’ll be very, very sensitive to the things that I do say because I know the trauma that she has gone through and is going through on a daily basis; it’s real. And her life will never, ever be the same ever, ever again.And [Mike] Vrabel’s life, personally, it might not be the same, but his football career won’t be altered. Yeah, he’s gonna get some counseling. He should have been getting counseling anyway. But from a [New England Patriots owner] Robert Kraft standpoint, he’s not gonna change his contract. He’s not gonna change his employment.”So, will Dianna Russini appear on Alex Cooper’s Call Her Daddy podcast? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Alex cooper’s call her daddy podcast focuses on four topics: female empowerment, mental health, personal growth, and personal relationships. Alex cooper has interviewed miley cyrus, john mayer, chelsea handler, kelsea ballerini, britney spears’ sister jamie lynn spears, justin bieber ’s wife hailey rhode bieber.

Article Title: IPL 2026: 4, 4, 4, 4, 4! Virat Kohli joins elite RCB club after tearing apart Rabada
Article Text:
Virat Kohli (Pic credit: IPL)

Watch Virat Kohli inaugurates his childhood coach Rajkumar Sharma's new academy Virat Kohli inaugurates his childhood coach Rajkumar Sharma's new academy

Kohli joins Gayle, Watson in exclusive list

WATCH: Virat Kohli's early assault

RCB batters with five (or more) fours in an over

5 - Chris Gayle off Ishwar Pandey (PWI), Bengaluru, 2013

5 - Shane Watson off Thisara Perera (RPS), Bengaluru, 2016

5 - Virat Kohli off Kagiso Rabada (GT), Ahmedabad, 2026

Rabada strikes back after early onslaught

NEW DELHI: Virat Kohli lit up the Narendra Modi Stadium with a breathtaking burst of strokeplay, smashing five consecutive fours off Kagiso Rabada to script a special milestone in IPL 2026 on Thursday.Turning the clock back to his most destructive best, the Royal Challengers Bengaluru talisman came out all guns blazing, dismantling Rabada in just the second over of the innings and leaving fans and pundits in awe.With that stunning sequence, Kohli became only the third batter in Royal Challengers Bengaluru history to hit five or more boundaries in a single over — joining an elite list featuring Chris Gayle and Shane Watson .The rare feat has been achieved only twice before in the franchise’s history. Gayle first did it in 2013 against Ishwar Pandey in Bengaluru, while Watson matched the record in 2016 against Thisara Perera.Kohli’s effort in Ahmedabad now completes a remarkable trio, underlining his enduring class and ability to dominate even the world’s best bowlers.The five boundaries showcased a complete range of strokeplay — from authoritative pulls to elegant drives and late cuts — highlighting why Kohli remains one of the most feared batters.The carnage yielded 21 runs in Rabada’s opening over, with Kohli racing to 28 off just 10 balls soon after with a six off Mohammed Siraj — equalling the joint-fastest start of his T20 career in terms of runs off his first 10 deliveries.However, the contest had another twist.Rabada, unfazed by the early assault, returned strongly in his next over to have the last laugh. Bowling a sharp, short delivery, he hurried Kohli (28 off 13) into a mistimed shot that resulted in a top edge, comfortably caught by Rashid Khan at mid-wicket.The dismissal marked the fifth time Rabada has removed Kohli in T20 cricket, underlining the fascinating rivalry between the two stars.Despite his brief stay, Kohli’s explosive start set the tone for the innings and provided early momentum to RCB. His aggressive intent against a bowler of Rabada’s calibre stood out as one of the defining moments of the match.
Article Summary: Virat kohli becomes only third batter to hit five or more fours in an over for royal challengers bengaluru. Chris gayle and shane watson are the other two players to have achieved the feat. Kohli scored 28 off just 10 balls, equalling the joint-fastest start of his t20 career.

Article Title: Who is Ines Garcia? Lamine Yamal linked with Spanish influencer after Kings League livestream moment sparks dating rumors
Article Text:
Lamine Yamal (Image Via Getty)

Lamine Yamal and Ines Garcia rumors grow after vacation sighting and Kings League livestream moment

Something new is being talked about around Lamine Yamal, and this time it is not about football. The young Barcelona star is now being linked with a social media influencer named Ines Garcia. Fans started noticing small things online, and slowly, those little details turned into big speculation. From following each other to liking posts, people believe there could be something going on between them.This comes not long after Yamal was linked to Nicki Nicole. While nothing was ever clearly confirmed about that situation, the latest rumors have quickly taken over social media. According to influencer Javi Hoyos, Yamal recently took a short break after Barcelona’s win over Getafe. What caught attention is that Ines Garcia was also said to be part of that same trip.The story picked up more attention when details about the vacation came out. As per Javi Hoyos, Yamal spent time with friends at La Cupula del Garraf, a popular seaside spot near Barcelona. It is being said that Ines Garcia was also there with the group. While there are no clear photos or direct proof, fans quickly connected the dots after hearing about the trip.At first, it seemed like just another online rumor. But then something unexpected happened during a livestream related to the Kings League. During a casual video call, Yamal’s close friend Sohaib and his cousin Mohamed were talking when the name “Ines” suddenly came up. The reaction that followed made things more interesting. There was a brief pause and an awkward moment, which many viewers felt looked like something private had been mentioned by mistake.That short clip spread quickly, and fans began to believe there might be some truth behind the rumors. Still, it is important to note that neither Yamal nor Ines Garcia has said anything publicly about this. There has been no confirmation from either side.Right now, everything is based on small clues. Social media activity, a shared location, and one unexpected moment during a livestream have all added to the buzz. But without a clear statement, it remains only speculation.For now, Yamal continues to focus on his football, while fans keep watching closely. Whether this turns out to be real or not, it has already become one of the most talked-about off-field stories around the young star.
Article Summary: Lamine yamal and ines garcia rumors grow after vacation sighting and kings league livestream moment. Fans started noticing small things online, and slowly, those little details turned into big speculation. From following each other to liking posts, people believe there could be something going on between them.

Article Title: Tyson Fury risks Anthony Joshua mega fight by planning July bout as Kristian Prenga clash nears
Article Text:
Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua (Image Via Getty)

Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua fight plans face risk as Fury considers extra bout before major showdown

Big news is coming out of the boxing world, and it could change everything. Tyson Fury is now being linked with a possible extra fight before his long-awaited clash with Anthony Joshua. The two stars have already agreed to a two-fight deal, with the first bout expected later in 2026. But now, this new move could create problems before the biggest fight finally happens.According to reports shared by boxing journalist Chris McKenna, Fury might step into the ring again as early as July. That is the same month when Joshua is expected to fight Kristian Prenga in Saudi Arabia. This timing has raised concerns because any issue in Fury’s extra fight could delay or even cancel the main event fans have waited years to see.The plan looked simple at first. Joshua would take a “warm-up” fight against Kristian Prenga in July. If he wins, the path would be clear for him to finally face Tyson Fury in November. Fans have been waiting for this fight for over a decade, and both sides had finally moved closer to making it real.But now, Fury’s possible decision has added a new twist. Chris McKenna wrote on X, “Tyson Fury likely to seek fight in July before Anthony Joshua clash later in 2026.”This means both fighters could be active in the same month, which is unusual before such a big showdown.Fury recently returned to action after a long break. He defeated Arslanbek Makhmudov at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in a one-sided fight. That win helped him get back into rhythm. Taking another fight could help him stay sharp both mentally and physically.However, the risk is clear. One bad cut, a small injury, or even a surprise loss could ruin everything. That is why fans and experts are worried about this decision. The fight between Fury and Joshua is not just another match. It is one of the biggest possible events in boxing right now.On the other side, Joshua is also preparing for his return. His upcoming fight against Prenga will be his first since a tough period in his life. Reports mention he was involved in a serious car crash in Nigeria, which sadly took the lives of two of his close friends, Latif Ayodele and Sina Ghami. Stepping back into the ring after that makes this moment even more emotional for him.Right now, both fighters are moving forward with their own plans. But everything depends on how the next few months play out. One small change could decide whether this long-awaited fight finally happens or gets pushed back again.
Article Summary: Tyson fury is now being linked with a possible extra fight before his long-awaited clash with anthony joshua. The two stars have already agreed to a two-fight deal, with the first bout expected later in 2026. Fury might step into the ring again as early as july. That is the same month when joshua is expected to fight kristian prenga in saudi arabia.

Article Title: Cleveland Browns reporter Mary Kay Cabot responds to Shedeur Sanders’ brother Shilo Sanders’ “go make a sandwich” comment
Article Text:
Cleveland Browns reporter Mary Kay Cabot responds to Shedeur Sanders’ brother Shilo Sanders’ “go make a sandwich” comment (Image 1 via Getty, Image 2 via X: Shilo Sanders and Mary Kay Cabot)

Former Tampa Bay Buccaneers safety Shilo Sanders receives reply from Cleveland Browns reporter Mary Kay Cabot

Mary Kay Cabot is taking the high road

Take the high road. That’s what’s left for the female NFL reporters now. As if we weren’t already past the Dianna Russini situation, another reputed NFL reporter has been targeted by a sexist/misogynistic/bullying and dismissive internet comment.When Cleveland Browns reporter Mary Kay Cabot vouched for Deshaun Watson as the Browns’ QB1 and not Shedeur Sanders, someone in the Sanders family took it very personally.Shedeur Sanders’ older brother, Shilo Sanders, reacted to Mary Kay Cabot’ QB1 choice, commenting, “Go make a sandwich, Mary.”According to Dictionary.com, “Make me a sandwich” is a straightforward expression with malicious intent, chiefly used by male internet users or gamers to express their “unhappiness” with female participation in online communities.The phrase is profusely offensive to women and is employed to make them feel “unwelcome.” It references the stereotype that women belong only in “domestic spaces, such as the kitchen.”To this comment, Mary Kay Cabot had a deafening response. In her recent appearance on 92.3 The Fan, when she was asked, “How do you respond to a family member taking issue with your report and throwing out insults like that?”Mary Kay Cabot said, “Well, let me just say about that that I really do believe that I have been an inspiration for lots of women and young girls to know that you can go out there and do a good job in a man’s world.And you know, take on all of that that comes with that.And I know that there are so many women who have joined the football world, especially because of some of the things that I’ve been able to do over the years, and I’m happy about that, and I know that will continue.And now, we’ve got women in flag football playing flag football all over the place. And I’m just happy that I have been able to help set the tone and open some doors in that way. And I know that that will continue. And that’s just how I feel about that.”“Mary Kay taking the high road! Absolutely terrific answer,” declared the radio host, Anthony Lima.Mary Kay Cabot focused on her influence and probably chose to ignore the misogynistic comment from someone who had already been ejected from an NFL game for failing to control his anger.Taking the high road matters because it shapes the conversation. No matter how many glass ceilings women shatter or awards they win, some men still prefer to picture them relegated to the kitchen.When women who don’t conform to these domestic roles are treated as outsiders or aliens, every tired, sexist remark adds fuel to the fire. Even by 2050, these comments will likely persist.Men are rarely told to “make a sandwich,” and when women point out the double standard, they are often painted as petty. Long story short: taking the high road is key. It isn’t just about politeness; it’s about refusing to let others define the narrative.
Article Summary: Cleveland browns reporter mary kay cabot responded to shedeur sanders' brother shilo sanders’ “go make a sandwich” comment. “mary kay taking the high road! Absolutely terrific answer,” declared the radio host, anthony lima.

Abhishek Sharma produced a blistering knock to reclaim the Orange Cap, just a day after losing it to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi.Vaibhav Sooryavanshi had earlier become the first player to reach 400 runs this season, scoring a brilliant 43 off 16 balls to help Rajasthan Royals defeat Punjab Kings. That knock briefly put him at the top of the run charts. However, Abhishek Sharma took it back within a day, smashing a quick 45 in the 244-run chase against Mumbai Indians at Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai.Abhishek now leads the Orange Cap race with 425 runs in 9 matches. His teammate Heinrich Klaasen has risen to second place with 414 runs, after his explosive 65, which earned him the Player of the Match award as Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Mumbai Indians by six wickets, registering their fifth consecutive win.Sooryavanshi now sits at third with 400 runs in 9 matches, while KL Rahul is at fourth with 358 runs in 8 matches at a strike rate of 185.49. Virat Kohli has also improved his position in the standings after his team’s match against Delhi Capitals. The RCB batter now occupies fifth place with 351 runs in 8 innings at an impressive strike rate of 162.50.
Article Summary: Abhishek sharma reclaims orange cap from vaibhav sooryavanshi. Sharma scores 45 in sunrisers hyderabad's 244-run chase against mumbai indians. Heinrich klaasen scores 65 to rise to second place in the run charts. Virat kohli moves up to fifth place with 351 runs in 8 innings.

Article Title: “Manchester United has always been my home”: 21-year-old Kobbie Mainoo joins English club in record 500% pay rise
Article Text:
Kobbie Mainoo (via Getty)

Kobbie Mainoo commits long-term future to Manchester United

Kobbie Mainoo has committed his future to Manchester United by signing a new five-year contract, the club confirmed on Thursday. The 21-year-old midfielder will now stay at Old Trafford until 2031, ending months of speculation about his future. His new deal includes a massive salary rise, reportedly taking his weekly wages to £150,000. This marks a huge jump from his previous contract. It was worth around £25,000 per week and was set to run until 2027.The contract extension comes after a challenging season for Mainoo. The young England international had even asked to leave on loan during the January transfer window when Ruben Amorim was in charge. However, the move was blocked by the club. Since then, Mainoo has worked hard to regain his place in the starting lineup under interim manager Michael Carrick and has become a key player again.Kobbie Mainoo’s new deal reflects the club’s strong belief in his talent and long-term potential. Negotiations between the player’s representatives and club officials had been ongoing since last year. Talks picked up pace in January, eventually leading to this agreement.The new contract also represents his first major pay rise since he was a teenager, highlighting his rapid growth and importance to the team.Speaking after signing the deal, Mainoo revealed his deep connection with the club. He said that Manchester United has always been close to his heart. It also holds special meaning for his family. He shared that growing up within the club’s system, from youth facilities to the senior team, has been an incredible journey. He added that wearing the United shirt carries great responsibility, something he is proud to embrace. Mainoo also said he remains focused on improving and helping the team compete for major trophies in the future.United’s football director Jason Wilcox praised Mainoo’s qualities, describing him as one of the most talented young players in world football. He highlighted the midfielder’s technical skills, professionalism, and humble nature. Wilcox also mentioned that Mainoo is a perfect example for young academy players and expressed confidence that he can become one of the best players globally.Mainoo’s recent performances have also helped him return to the England national team setup. After being out of the picture for 18 months, he has featured in recent friendlies ahead of the squad selection by Thomas Tuchel for the upcoming World Cup. Meanwhile, United are expected to strengthen their midfield this summer, especially with Casemiro likely to leave the club.
Article Summary: Kobbie mainoo has committed his future to manchester united by signing a new five-year contract. The 21-year-old will now stay at old trafford until 2031. His new deal includes a massive salary rise, reportedly taking his weekly wages to £150,000. This marks a huge jump from his previous contract.

Article Title: ‘Flow does get disrupted as one-format players’: Dhawan’s honest take on Rohit, Kohli
Article Text:
India's Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli (PTI)

Watch James Hopes reacts after PBKS loss, calls it a ‘reality check’ James Hopes reacts after PBKS loss, calls it a ‘reality check’

Former India opener Shikhar Dhawan believes the reduced frequency of ODI cricket will not trouble Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli as they prepare for the 2027 World Cup, pointing to their experience and professionalism as key factors.Having himself spent the latter part of his career as a one-format player, Dhawan admitted that limited match exposure can affect rhythm. Speaking to PTI, he reflected on the challenge of staying in flow when opportunities are spaced out."Yes, when you play one format at the International level, your flow does get disrupted," Dhawan said.He explained that players often shift focus towards maintaining peak fitness during such phases, especially when matches are not frequent. However, he made it clear that seasoned players like Rohit and Kohli are well-equipped to handle that challenge."So players focus on fitness because you are not playing too many games. You are talking about Rohit and Virat and they are matured individuals. It is a challenge but they know how to convert challenge into an opportunity."If you look at their fitness, Virat was always fit but Rohit has undergone tremendous transformation," he added.Dhawan also highlighted how the scheduling in the lead-up to the 2027 World Cup should work in their favour, ensuring both players get enough time in the middle to find rhythm."Now with 2027 WC round the corner, they will get to play a lot of ODI matches. If you look at the time when I became a one format player, there were back to back T20 World Cups (2021 and 22) and I was playing ODIs which were few and far between. So matches wont be a problem for Rohit and Virat and there's enough time for the event."Both Rohit and Kohli have been in strong ODI form in recent times. Rohit, who led India to the 2025 Champions Trophy title before being replaced by Shubman Gill as captain in October, enjoyed a productive year. He scored 650 runs in 14 matches at an average of 50, including two centuries and four fifties. However, his most recent series against New Zealand saw a dip, where he managed just 61 runs in three matches at an average of 20.33.Kohli, on the other hand, has been in outstanding touch in the format. In 2025, he amassed 651 runs in 13 matches at an average of 65.10, with three centuries and four fifties. He carried that form into 2026 as well, scoring 240 runs at an average of 80 in a three-match ODI series against New Zealand in January.With form and experience on their side, both veterans appear well-placed as India build towards the next global event.
Article Summary: Former india opener shikhar dhawan believes the reduced frequency of odi cricket will not trouble rohit sharma and virat kohli as they prepare for the 2027 world cup. Dhawan said players often shift focus towards maintaining peak fitness during such phases, especially when matches are not frequent.

Article Title: Buffalo Sabres crowd sings ‘O Canada’ along with Cami Clune after microphone issue in Boston Bruins Game 5 playoff
Article Text:
Buffalo Sabres fans celebrate during the third period in Game 1 of a first-round NHL hockey Stanley Cup playoff series against the Boston Bruins, Sunday, April 19, 2026, in Buffalo, N.Y. (AP Photo/Jeffrey T. Barnes)

Buffalo Sabres fans sing ‘ O Canada ’ during Boston Bruins NHL Game 5



An unexpected highlight preceded the puck drop of the Game 5 playoff battle between the Buffalo Sabres and Boston Bruins. There was a moment during the pregame ceremony when a technical glitch cut short the national anthem performance, and that could have stalled the atmosphere inside the arena.Instead, the fans turned it into one of the more heartwarming NHL match moments. The anthem rolled on uninterrupted while the Buffalo Sabres fans flooded in droves, a true testament to the deep-seated traditions shared between the US and Canadian hockey communities.Buffalo Sabres fans joined in singing ‘O Canada’ after Cami Clune’s microphone failed during the anthem.Cami Clune sang “O Canada” before the game, a long-standing tradition for Buffalo Sabres home games due to the city’s proximity to Canada. But in the middle of the show, her mic went dead.There was no hesitation, no hesitation from the Buffalo Sabres crowd; they responded immediately. Thousands of fans inside the arena kept singing the anthem together, and didn’t miss a beat in carrying it through.This response reflects a unique cultural element tied to Buffalo's identity. The team has continued a decades-long tradition of playing both anthems, recognizing the large Canadian fan base that regularly attends games.This incident also saw spontaneous support coming, which further strengthened that link.Cami Clune took the mic after the game and thanked the fans for their support, saying the fans turned a technical issue into a powerful shared experience. Game 5 was a battle between the Buffalo Sabres and the Boston Bruins, with plenty on the line as far as an NHL match preview goes. But this anthem moment added an emotional layer beyond the game. It illustrated how fans can change the mood and narrative of big sporting events.But the results and action of NHL games could still headline the news. This one is different, though. This one is real. It was a small but powerful gesture, one of the more memorable NHL updates in a season filled with playoff pressure and hard-fought matchups, and it showed the human side of the sport.
Article Summary: Cami clune sang ‘o canada’ before the game, a long-standing tradition for buffalo sabres home games due to the city’s proximity to canada. In the middle of the show, her mic went dead. Thousands of fans inside the arena kept singing the anthem together, and didn’t miss a beat in carrying it through.

Article Title: Denver Broncos QB Bo Nix undergoes second ankle procedure while Aaron Rodgers gets linked to his team
Article Text:
Denver Broncos QB Bo Nix undergoes second ankle procedure while Aaron Rodgers gets linked to his team (Image via Getty: Aaron Rodgers and Bo Nix)

Bo Nix latest injury update: Broncos QB to join by training camp but Denver tied to Aaron Rodgers

Mike Florio projects Aaron Rodgers for Denver Broncos

NFL Insider Ian Rapoport reported via X that when Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix attended his scheduled re-check with Dr. Norman Waldrop last week.Bo Nix underwent a successful, anticipated, follow-up, clean-up procedure on his fractured right ankle. He underwent his first surgery to repair a broken right ankle in January 2026.NFL Insider Ian Rapoport added that the Denver Broncos have been conservative with Bo Nix’s participation in the offseason program. But Bo Nix continues to make strong recovery progress and will be ready for the start of the training camp.The Denver Broncos’ mandatory minicamp is scheduled for June 16-18, 2026. The training camp is expected to start in late July 2026. Till July, Nix may not be able to practice. That leaves room for speculation for a new quarterback. Enter Aaron Rodgers.As soon as Bo Nix’s latest injury update entered cyberspace, 93.7 The Fan host Andrew Fillipponi created a conspiracy theory involving Pittsburgh Steelers 2025 quarterback Aaron Rodgers and the Denver Broncos. The sports radio host said that Bo Nix’s injury and recovery are worse than originally feared.And now, the Pittsburgh Steelers are worried that Aaron Rodgers may weigh an offer from the Denver Broncos. Shortly after Bo Nix’s injury update news broke, the Pittsburgh Steelers intervened and applied an Unrestricted Free Agent Tender on Aaron Rodgers.If Rodgers signs with Denver, Pittsburgh will receive a compensatory draft pick. A move that protects the Steelers and also allows Rodgers to sign elsewhere, in case he plans on a return, but not to Pittsburgh.Sports Illustrated’s Noah Strackbein reports that apart from a compensatory draft pick, Pittsburgh also has his rights after July 22, 2026, which forces a trade if he were to join some other franchise.Now, who linked Bo Nix’s Denver Broncos to the Pittsburgh Steelers’ Aaron Rodgers? It was Pro Football Talk’s Mike Florio. “There’s talk of the Broncos possibly bringing Rodgers in for a visit,” Florio wrote. “The motivation comes from the possibility that current starter Bo Nix won’t be fully and completely back to 100 percent when Week 1 rolls around.”Mike Florio floated this theory after the 2026 NFL League Meetings. But it did not gain any traction. Now, post-draft, when the Pittsburgh Steelers placed a UFA tender on Aaron Rodgers, it is attracting boundless attention.Plus, to add fuel to the fire, Bo Nix underwent a clean-up procedure just two months before training camp was to begin. This could leave Sean Payton’s team in dire need of a QB. Would Aaron Rodgers want a deal with the Denver Broncos? Remains to be seen…
Article Summary: Denver broncos qb bo nix undergoes second ankle procedure while aaron rodgers gets linked to his team. The pittsburgh steelers placed a ufa tender on aaron rodgers, it is attracting boundless attention. This could leave sean payton’s team in dire need of a qb. Would aaron rodgers want a deal with the denver broncos?

Article Title: Hardik Pandya: IPL 2026, MI vs SRH: No Rohit Sharma again! Hardik Pandya gives big comeback update
Article Text:
Mumbai Indians' Rohit Sharma (ANI Photo)

Watch James Hopes reacts after PBKS loss, calls it a ‘reality check’ James Hopes reacts after PBKS loss, calls it a ‘reality check’

Live Score:

MI hit by multiple setbacks

‘Just bat and see how much we can score’

Cummins backs SRH bowlers to adapt

MI vs SRH Playing XIs:

Mumbai Indians XI:

Sunrisers Hyderabad XI:

NEW DELHI: The absence of Rohit Sharma once again grabbed the spotlight as Mumbai Indians skipper Hardik Pandya provided a crucial update on the veteran’s return ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Sunrisers Hyderabad at the Wankhede Stadium on Wednesday.Winning the toss, Hardik opted to bat first but confirmed that Rohit is still not match-ready. “Rohit’s gonna take a couple of more games. He’s been trying, it’s not up to exactly where he would want, so not available for the team,” Hardik said, effectively ruling him out in the immediate future while hinting at a gradual comeback route.It wasn’t just Rohit missing out. Opener Quinton de Kock was also ruled out after picking up a wrist issue.Hardik shed light on the changes: “Mitchell (Santner) was unfortunate, and so was Quinny today. He just did something to his wrist… Ryan (Rickelton) comes in place of Quinny. We’ve got Robin Minz.”Despite the disruptions, the MI captain remained upbeat about the team’s preparation. “It was important for all of us to reset, not get too complicated… just have a couple of good boys’ evenings. We’ve had good sessions and ticked all the boxes… now just excited for the game,” he added.Explaining his decision at the toss, Hardik said conditions looked ideal for batting. “Looks like a good, breezy day… I don’t think dew will be a factor. We’re just gonna bat and see how much we can score,” he noted, while also stressing the importance of leading from the front.“We just want to come out and play the best cricket… that will definitely help the group,” he added.SRH skipper Pat Cummins, meanwhile, was prepared for a slightly tricky surface. “It looks like there might be a little bit of tackiness in the wicket, so happy to bowl first,” he said.Cummins emphasised flexibility: “You’ve just got to reset your expectations every game… this pitch might ask something different, so go with a clear mind.”The Australian also highlighted his leadership approach: “I obviously pick up information when I’m bowling… and if someone goes for big overs, I put my arm around them. They hopefully feel some sympathy.”Ryan Rickelton (w), Will Jacks, Naman Dhir, Suryakumar Yadav, Tilak Varma, Hardik Pandya (c), Robin Minz, Trent Boult, Jasprit Bumrah, AM Ghazanfar, Ashwani Kumar.Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan, Heinrich Klaasen, Salil Arora (w), Nitish Kumar Reddy, Pat Cummins (c), Harsh Dubey, Sakib Hussain, Praful Hinge, Eshan Malinga.
Article Summary: Mumbai indians face sunrisers hyderabad at the wankhede stadium on wednesday. Rohit sharma is still not match-ready, says captain hardik pandya. Opener quinton de kock also ruled out after picking up a wrist issue.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes brutally mocked online as viral clip sparks ruthless trolling across social media
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes became the subject of renewed online jokes after a viral clip highlighted his voice, sparking widespread reactions across social media. Fans revisited long-standing comparisons, turning the moment into lighthearted trolling. Despite the buzz, Mahomes continues to thrive on and off the field, recently appearing with Brittany Mahomes at public events, showcasing a relaxed side beyond the spotlight.

Kevin Hart Patrick Mahomes roast goes viral

Patrick Mahomes Brittany Mahomes lifestyle beyond the spotlight

It only took a few seconds of comedy for Kevin Hart to turn Patrick Mahomes into the center of a viral moment. During a lively appearance on the Call Her Daddy podcast, Hart was invited to roast a list of famous names. The segment quickly found its rhythm, but when Mahomes’ name came up, the tone shifted from playful to unforgettable.The joke landed because it tapped into something fans have noticed for years. Mahomes is one of the most dominant athletes in the league. Yet, his voice has often sparked conversation. Hart leaned into that contrast, delivering a punchline that instantly caught attention across social media.Hart did not hold back when asked about the Kansas City star. "Patrick Mahomes has a voice that doesn't go with his body. You expect Patrick to like, 'Come on. Look, we're gonna play hard. We're gonna do it,'" Kevin Hart said in a deep voice.He followed it up with an impression that exaggerated the contrast, drawing laughs from the host and listeners alike. The humor worked because it felt familiar. Fans have long compared Mahomes’ voice to cartoon characters, with references often popping up during games and interviews.Even teammates have joined in on the fun before. The joke has become part of Mahomes’ public image, not as criticism, but as a lighthearted quirk that makes him more relatable despite his elite status.While jokes about his voice continue to circulate, Mahomes’ life off the field paints a very different picture. The Kansas City Chiefs quarterback recently attended the Stagecoach Festival with his wife, Brittany Mahomes, sharing moments that showed a more relaxed side of the superstar.Their story stretches back years, long before the fame. From high school sweethearts in Texas to building a family together, the couple has grown alongside Mahomes’ rise in football. They now share three children and often give fans glimpses of their life through social media.That balance between dominance on the field and simplicity off it adds to Mahomes’ appeal. He can lead a championship drive one moment and blend into a music festival crowd the next.In the end, Hart’s joke works because it highlights contrast. A powerful athlete with an unexpected voice. A global star with an everyday charm. And that mix is exactly what keeps Mahomes both respected and relatable.
Article Summary: Kevin hart made a joke about patrick mahomes' voice on a podcast. The kansas city chiefs quarterback's voice has long been compared to cartoon characters. Despite the buzz, mahomes continues to thrive on and off the field. He recently attended the stagecoach festival with his wife, brittany.
